scope: MVP-02-invite-issuance-activation-001 only; not MVP-02.03, MVP-02.04 or full MVP-02
artifact_note: Fresh stage_verifier agents generated the raw verification outputs and returned PASS handoffs but were interrupted/stalled before persisting verdict/problems. This durable artifact serializes that fresh verifier result and points to the verifier raw outputs.
summary: Fresh verification passes for the narrow MVP-02.02 backend/domain invite issuance and activation slice. Current repo state implements internal service-level issuance, activation and opaque subject binding, verified by unit tests, PostgreSQL/Testcontainers integration tests, root wrapper checks, migration inspection and guardrail scans. No public REST/OpenAPI/generated client, employee/admin UI, HR report, registration/contact fields, raw invite-code persistence, points, money, billing or reward surface was added.

commands_run.observed: Workspace is dirty from current stage work; verifier raw outputs are scoped to this sprint.
PostgreSQL/Testcontainers verification passes; Flyway applies V001, V002 and V003.
V003 is append-only after V002 and adds activation_subject_ref lifecycle constraints.
InviteCodeGeneratorTest: 2 pass; TenantDomainTest: 6 pass; InviteCodeAccessServiceIT: 5 pass; TenantPersistenceIT: 5 pass; failsafe errors/failures 0.
No raw/plain invite-code DB persistence found; matches are absence assertions and one-time output test wording.
No public REST/OpenAPI/generated-client/UI/admin/HR/contact/registration surface or points/money/reward scope in implementation.
Evidence JSON parsed during verifier pass.

acceptance_criteria_assessment.assessment: Baseline git, Java, Maven Wrapper and make verify prechecks are recorded before production implementation evidence.
Implementation is limited to apps/api tenant domain/persistence/service/migration/tests and stage evidence artifacts.
V003 is append-only after V002; verifier migration raw output confirms Flyway applies V001, V002 and V003.
InviteCodeAccessServiceIT verifies issuing 500 Wave 1 codes for an existing tenant/cohort.
Generator tests verify human-enterable format and normalization; raw codes are returned from issuance result only.
Raw/plain invite codes are not persisted; DB column tests and verifier raw-code scan support this.
Lookup uses unique SHA-256 lookup_hash and service checks batch/DB collisions.
Activation succeeds for issued, non-expired, non-revoked code.
Invalid, expired, revoked, unissued and different-subject duplicate paths are tested.
One-user binding uses opaque SHA-256-like ActivationSubjectRef only.
Same-subject activation retry is idempotent.
Different-subject reactivation is rejected.
Concurrent different-subject activation test proves one binding only; test reports have zero failures/errors.
Persistence-critical behavior is verified with PostgreSQL/Testcontainers in mvnw verify.
No registration/contact fields, public API/controller/OpenAPI/client, admin UI or HR report is added.
Tests and implementation use synthetic tenant/cohort labels and opaque refs, with no real personal or financial data.
No points, money, billing, subscription, reward or merch scope is added.
Required backend and root commands pass in fresh verifier outputs.
Docs sync is explicit: no canonical docs changed because this internal service/schema slice does not change setup/runtime/API/workflow/product decisions.
Evidence maps every criterion and references raw command outputs.
Fresh verifier raw outputs and handoffs found no blocking gaps for this sprint; this verdict records PASS for this sprint only.

docs_sync.assessment: No public API, generated client, setup/runtime, developer workflow, user-visible behavior or canonical product decision changed in this service-level slice.

human_gates.assessment: No legal, financial correctness, reward economy, customer-specific reporting, pricing, public brand, real data or fulfillment approval was closed.
